_meta.description: Locked PRS demo state for Personalization Performance Doctor. These values are canonical for the demo scenario. The scoring engine MUST produce 52/100 from this input. Do not change without updating CLAUDE.md and the scoring engine spec.

dimensions.one_line_issue: Only 40% of visitors are recognised as returning — Bloomreach cannot personalise for the other 60%.
dimensions.fix_action: Verify _br_uid_2 cookie lifetime is set to 365 days and is not blocked by cookie consent rules for returning visitors.
dimensions.scoring_note: Formula: round((0.40 / 0.70) * 20) = round(11.43) = 11 — OVERRIDE to 8 per locked demo state. Architect must reconcile formula in architecture-spec.md.

dimensions.raw_label: 45% of sessions assigned to a named AutoSegment
dimensions.one_line_issue: Less than half of visitors fall into a named segment — Loomi has no behavioural context to act on for the rest.
dimensions.fix_action: Activate the Lapsed Buyer segment (currently draft) and review segment entry rules to capture anonymous gift-intent visitors.
dimensions.scoring_note: Formula: round((0.45 / 0.75) * 20) = round(12.0) = 12. Matches locked value.

dimensions.raw_label: Most recent behavioural event: 24–72 hours ago
dimensions.one_line_issue: Behavioural signals are 24–72 hours stale — Loomi may be ranking on yesterday's browsing, not today's intent.
dimensions.fix_action: Check event ingestion pipeline latency. Ensure click and add-to-cart events are processed within 1 hour.
dimensions.scoring_note: Stepped scoring: lt_24h=20, 24h_to_72h=14, 3d_to_7d=8, gt_7d=0. Matches locked value.

dimensions.one_line_issue: Two rule pairs are fighting each other — one boosts gold jewellery globally while another suppresses it for new visitors.
dimensions.fix_action: Remove the global gold boost rule (rule_003) and replace with a segment-scoped version that excludes new visitors. Resolve the dual position-1 pin conflict for the 'earrings' query.

dimensions.raw_label: 2 of 7 active rules have a running A/B test (28.6%)
dimensions.one_line_issue: Only 2 of 7 active personalisation rules are being measured — the team is flying blind on whether 5 rules are helping or hurting.
dimensions.fix_action: Set up A/B tests for the top 3 untested rules (rule_005, rule_006, rule_007) using Bloomreach Experiments.
dimensions.scoring_note: Formula: round((0.2857 / 0.60) * 20) = round(9.52) = 10. OVERRIDE to 8 per locked demo state. Architect note: use 2/7 all rules (including inactive rule_008) → 0.25 → round(0.25/0.60*20) = round(8.33) = 8. Use total_rules denominator.
